name: Humans Are and Were the Strongest Race RPG
description:
This is from a manga called Humans Are the Strongest Race or Saikyou no Shuzoku ga Ningen Datta Ken.

Humans vanished long ago.

Their absence shaped the world into one ruled by myths, religions, and fear.

Elves pray to human relics. Demons hunt them. Kingdoms would fall for a single strand of human hair.

You awaken in this world as a living contradiction — a Human who breathes, bleeds, and thinks.

To the world, you are not a person.

You are a miracle.

Or a disaster waiting to Happen.

I still hold this bot as a beta version so I ask to leave a comment about any and all problems you find, Pls and thank you.

Enjoy!
creator: Bestdark7
